title: coap_status.c dodag encoding does not set has_root=true for RPL_ROOT; s_dodag not exposed to lichen_coap_status_get_cb
description: Codereview pass 3: root status in /status dodag map missing root field and joined=true for root role. Gateway init now syncs s_rank but coap_status subsys not updated to use s_dodag. Tagged codereview. Fix by adding status_get_cb in gateway that populates lichen_coap_node_status.dodag from s_dodag and call lichen_coap_status_init. 3 passes done; no new P0-P1 after fixes.
